name: Path of Dao
short_description: "Path of Dao" is a strategic simulation game where you connect nodes to harness spiritual energy, facing trials like heavenly tribulations, inner demons, and beasts. Only the steadfast can ascend to immortality!
detailed_description:
关于我们

官方Q群：626452637

官方B站：梦鲸工作室

官方小黑盒：梦鲸工作室


About the Game

《Path of Dao》— Cultivate, Transcend, Ascend!

Embark on an extraordinary journey of strategy and cultivation in this innovative fantasy adventure. Through spiritual alignment and elemental resonance, harness the energy of heaven and earth to refine your power, facing trials of heavenly tribulations, inner demons, and monstrous foes. Choose your path—Daoist harmony, Demonic supremacy, Buddhist enlightenment, or Confucian virtue—each with unique abilities and destiny-shaping choices.

Key Features:

  • Elemental Resonance – Connect spiritual energies to gain insights and forge divine treasures

  • Divine Tribulations – Survive catastrophic lightning and fire trials with each breakthrough

  • Demon-Slaying Arts – Unleash mystical techniques to purge evil and defend your Dao Heart

  • Celestial Phenomena – Shifting seasons and lunar cycles influence cultivation opportunities

  • Karmic Trials – Resolve mortal attachments to sever inner demons and achieve enlightenment

From Qi Refining to Ascendant Immortality, every breath aligns with the Dao. Will you walk the path of serenity, embrace ruthless ambition, seek transcendent wisdom, or uphold righteous virtue? The choice is yours—will you defy the heavens?

The immortal gate awaits—is your Dao Heart unshakable?
